    • build

      public EmbeddedServer build() throws Exception
      Build the bookie server.

      The sequence of the components is: 

       - stats provider
 - bookie server
 - autorecovery daemon
 - http service
      Returns:
      lifecycle stack
      Throws:
      Exception
